title: Zoomax
description: Zoomax, zoom all the way to the max.
body:
# Zoomax 

-----

##  Zoom all the way to the Max.

Zoomax adds a smooth and responsive zoom feature to Minecraft with smart controls and fluid transitions. Designed for players who want a seamless and natural zoom experience.

---

## Features

### Dynamic Zoom
- Hold **C** to activate zoom mode
- Scroll while holding **C** to zoom in or out smoothly
- Release **C** to return to normal view

### Smart Zoom Lock
- Press **Y** while zooming to lock the current zoom level
- Locked zoom stays active until unlocked
- Press **Y** again to reset to normal view

### Intelligent Scroll Behavior
- When zooming: mouse wheel adjusts zoom level
- When locked: mouse wheel switches hotbar items
- Prevents accidental zoom changes during gameplay

---

## Controls

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| **C (Hold)** | Activate zoom mode |
| **Y (Press)** | Lock or unlock zoom |

---

## Configuration
 
- Key bindings customizable under "Zoomax" in Controls settings

---
